name: Mob Gladiator
teaser: A gladiator arena game where each fight earns upgrades before the next wave begins.
mainDescription: A gladiator survival game built around fighting one wave, buying upgrades, and stepping back into the arena stronger for the next wave.
secondaryDescription: Mob Gladiator is about surviving structured arena fights, then using the reward window between waves to improve your build. The loop is simple: fight, earn, upgrade, and return to the arena with better tools for the next challenge.
